name: Royal Rajasthan Odyssey
shortDescription: Forts, palaces, and desert sunsets across the land of maharajas.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Jaipur
itinerary.description: Arrive at Jaipur airport, check-in at heritage hotel. Evening visit to Albert Hall Museum.

itinerary.title: Jaipur Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Full day tour — Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar. Bazaar walk in evening.

itinerary.title: Jaipur to Jodhpur
itinerary.description: Drive to the Blue City. Visit Mehrangarh Fort and Jaswant Thada memorial.

itinerary.title: Jodhpur to Jaisalmer
itinerary.description: Travel to the Golden City. Check in and evening stroll in the old walled city.

itinerary.title: Jaisalmer Desert Day
itinerary.description: Jaisalmer Fort, Patwon Ki Haveli. Afternoon camel safari in Sam Sand Dunes. Overnight camp.

itinerary.title: Jaisalmer to Udaipur
itinerary.description: Fly or long drive to the City of Lakes. Check-in with lake view.

itinerary.title: Udaipur Exploration
itinerary.description: City Palace, Jagdish Temple, boat ride on Lake Pichola, Saheliyon ki Bari gardens.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Morning free for shopping. Transfer to airport. Journey ends with golden memories.

name: Kerala Backwaters & Spice Trail
shortDescription: Houseboat cruises, misty hill stations, and ancient Ayurveda in God's Own Country.

itinerary.title: Arrive Kochi
itinerary.description: Arrive in Kochi, explore Fort Kochi, Chinese fishing nets, Mattancherry Palace.

itinerary.title: Kochi to Munnar
itinerary.description: Drive through winding mountain roads to Munnar. Visit Eravikulam National Park.

itinerary.title: Munnar Tea Country
itinerary.description: Tea museum, spice gardens, Top Station viewpoint. Sunset at Mattupetty Dam.

itinerary.title: Munnar to Alleppey
itinerary.description: Drive down to the backwaters. Board your private houseboat at noon.

itinerary.title: Houseboat Cruise
itinerary.description: Lazy morning cruise through village canals. Visit paddy fields and coconut groves. Sunset on the lake.

itinerary.title: Departure from Kochi
itinerary.description: Morning Ayurveda session. Transfer to Kochi airport.

name: Himalayan Himachal Explorer
shortDescription: Snow peaks, apple orchards, monasteries, and river valleys in the lap of the Himalayas.

itinerary.title: Arrive Manali
itinerary.description: Arrive at Manali, settle in. Evening Mall Road stroll and local market exploration.

itinerary.title: Local Manali Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Hadimba Temple, Manu Temple, Tibetan Monastery, Van Vihar. Vashisht hot springs in evening.

itinerary.title: Rohtang Pass Day Trip
itinerary.description: Early morning drive to Rohtang Pass (subject to permits). Snow activities, stunning glacier views.

itinerary.title: Solang Valley
itinerary.description: Solang Valley for paragliding, zorbing, and cable car rides. Afternoon at leisure.

itinerary.title: Manali to Kasol
itinerary.description: Drive through Kullu Valley to the hippie haven of Kasol. River camping.

itinerary.title: Kheerganga Trek
itinerary.description: Trek to Kheerganga hot springs through pine forests. Hot spring dip at summit.

itinerary.title: Return to Manali & Departure
itinerary.description: Drive back to Manali for departure flight/bus.

name: Sacred Varanasi & Prayagraj Pilgrimage
shortDescription: Witness the eternal city where life, death and spirituality flow together on the banks of the Ganga.

itinerary.title: Arrive Varanasi
itinerary.description: Arrive and check in. Evening Ganga Aarti at Dashashwamedh Ghat — one of India's most spiritual spectacles.

itinerary.title: Varanasi Deep Dive
itinerary.description: Pre-dawn boat ride on the Ganga to watch the sunrise over the ghats. Kashi Vishwanath Temple. Narrow lanes exploration.

itinerary.title: Sarnath & Prayagraj
itinerary.description: Morning Sarnath — where Buddha gave his first sermon. Afternoon drive to Prayagraj (Allahabad).

itinerary.title: Sangam & Departure
itinerary.description: Boat ride at the holy Triveni Sangam. Anand Bhawan. Departure.

name: Andaman Island Escape
shortDescription: Pristine beaches, coral reefs, and turquoise waters at the edge of the Indian Ocean.

itinerary.title: Arrive Port Blair
itinerary.description: Arrive, check-in. Cellular Jail tour. Evening light and sound show.

itinerary.title: Port Blair Local
itinerary.description: Ross Island, North Bay Island (snorkelling), Corbyn's Cove beach.

itinerary.title: Ferry to Havelock
itinerary.description: Morning ferry to Havelock Island. Afternoon at Radhanagar Beach — one of Asia's best.

itinerary.title: Havelock Water Adventures
itinerary.description: Full day — scuba diving or snorkelling at Elephant Beach. Glass-bottom boat ride.

itinerary.title: Havelock to Neil Island
itinerary.description: Morning ferry to Neil Island. Natural Rock Bridge, Bharatpur Beach.

itinerary.title: Return & Departure
itinerary.description: Ferry back to Port Blair. Transfer to airport.

name: Northeast Frontier — Meghalaya & Assam
shortDescription: Living root bridges, Kaziranga rhinos, Brahmaputra river cruises, and mist-covered hills.

itinerary.title: Arrive Guwahati
itinerary.description: Arrive Guwahati. Kamakhya Temple visit. Brahmaputra evening cruise.

itinerary.title: Kaziranga Safari
itinerary.description: Drive to Kaziranga. Evening arrival. Jeep safari to spot one-horned rhinos, elephants, tigers.

itinerary.title: Kaziranga to Shillong
itinerary.description: Morning elephant safari. Drive to Shillong — the Scotland of the East.

itinerary.title: Shillong Exploration
itinerary.description: Ward's Lake, Don Bosco Museum, local markets. Overnight in Shillong.

itinerary.title: Cherrapunji Day Trip
itinerary.description: Nohkalikai Falls, Mawsmai Caves, Seven Sisters Falls viewpoint.

itinerary.title: Living Root Bridges
itinerary.description: Trek to the double-decker living root bridges of Nongriat village. Worth every step.

itinerary.title: Dawki & Mawlynnong
itinerary.description: Crystal-clear Dawki River. Asia's cleanest village — Mawlynnong. Bangladesh border view.

itinerary.title: Majuli Island
itinerary.description: Drive + ferry to Majuli — world's largest river island. Satra monastery stay.

itinerary.title: Return Guwahati & Departure
itinerary.description: Ferry back. Drive to Guwahati airport. Departure.
